title: Software Developer
//_comment: HERO: Focuses on potential, growth, and enthusiasm.
summary: Dedicated developer building a versatile foundation in full-stack and mobile platforms. Currently focused on mastering Java and .NET backend architectures while growing my front-end expertise through React. I am a detail-oriented problem solver who prioritizes industry best practices and continuous professional growth.
//_comment: ABOUT: Focuses on the academic journey and transferable soft skills.
bio: I am currently completing my diploma in IT Software Development at NBCC, where I have dedicated myself to mastering the fundamentals of web and mobile platforms. My academic projects have given me hands-on experience with the full software lifecycle from architecting robust backends and databases to building native mobile applications and exploring dynamic web interfaces.

Before transitioning into tech, I spent years in team leadership and operations. Managing high-volume environments taught me the value of clear communication, adaptability, and reliability. I am excited to bring these professional qualities to a development team as I continue to evolve in this field.

I am the developer who reads the documentation thoroughly, refactors for clarity before moving on, and treats every code review as a valuable learning opportunity. I am currently seeking practicum and entry-level roles where I can contribute to meaningful projects and grow alongside a collaborative engineering team.
